Name: Boost
Basic Effect: Bonus +1/SP to test next turn

Name: Rapid Reload (Ranged)
Basic Effect: Reload missile weapon free action

Name: Skirmish
Basic Effect: Move you or target 2 yards/SP

Name: Stay Aware
Basic Effect: TN 11 Perception test; New information or +1 to next test

Name: Disarm
Basic Effect: Opposed attack roll. If successful, knock weapon 1d6 + Str away

Name: Grab (Melee)
Basic Effect: Opposed Brawling tests. If successful, opponent can't move

Name: Knock Prone
Basic Effect: Opposed attack roll. If successful, knock enemy prone

Name: Mighty Blow
Basic Effect: Extra 1d6 damage

Name: Pierce Armor
Basic Effect: Treat enemy armour as if half, rounded down

Name: Pin (Grabbed)
Basic Effect: If Grabbed; foe becomes defenseless

Name: Defensive Stance
Basic Effect: Add 4 Defence until your next turn

Name: Lightning Attack
Basic Effect: Make another attack (No extra SP)

Name: Crushing Blow
Basic Effect: Reduce target's AR by 2 until repaired or healed

Name: Seize The Initiative
Basic Effect: Move to the top of the turn order

Name: Lethal Blow
Basic Effect: Extra 2d6 damage

Name: Impress
Basic Effect: Bonus +1/SP to next social test next turn

Name: Read the Situation
Basic Effect: Discover Attitude of #SP people

Name: Crowd Appeal
Basic Effect: Effect an extra person/SP, if Willpower equal or less than Con

Name: Hidden Message
Basic Effect: Convey a secret message to someone in a conversation

Name: Taunt
Basic Effect: Opposed Deception vs Self Discipline. Success; -1 to all tests

Name: Spot Tells
Basic Effect: Gain a sense of how the target tries to deceive you

Name: Pay Attention
Basic Effect: Gain a lead in an investigation

Name: Sway
Basic Effect: Shift your target's Attitude toward you

Name: Inspire
Basic Effect: Provide +1 bonus to allies until next turn

Name: Manipulate
Basic Effect: Prompt the target to commit a rash action

Name: Undermine
Basic Effect: Target suffers -2 to all non-attack tests while near you

Name: Assist
Basic Effect: Help an ally, +1/SP bonus

Name: Wariness
Basic Effect: Gain +1/SP to test for your next action (eg; hiding)

Name: Efficiency
Basic Effect: Actions or Resources halved; Gain +2 to initiative

Name: Insight
Basic Effect: Bluff your way through next test; Gain +1 bonus

Name: Compensate
Basic Effect: Ignore environmental penalties

Name: Extra Information
Basic Effect: Learn an additional piece of information

Name: Cover Your Tracks
Basic Effect: Remove evidence of your action; TN to discover = Successful Roll

Name: Ready For Action
Basic Effect: If combat initiates, gain a minor action to go first

Name: Swiftness
Basic Effect: Perform without using action time or incrementing challenge time

Name: Sabotage
Basic Effect: Hinder your opponent, TN to avoid = Successful Roll

Name: Powerful Casting
Basic Effect: Increase Spellpower by +1/SP

Name: Skillful Casting
Basic Effect: Reduce magic cost by 1 MP

Name: Mighty Spell
Basic Effect: Increase spell damage to one target by 1d6

Name: Lasting Spell
Basic Effect: Double duration of non-instantaneous spells

Name: Magic Shield
Basic Effect: Add 2 Defence until your next turn

Name: Fast Casting
Basic Effect: Cast another spell of Minor or Major casting time (No extra SP)

Name: Imposing Spell
Basic Effect: Cannot be attacked by anyone (Melee) if failed 10+Willpower test

Name: Split Spell
Basic Effect: Hit 2 targets instead of 1, within 6 yards

Name: Disrupt Magic
Basic Effect: Power Arcana vs. Spellpower to interupt a magic effect

Name: Lethal Spell
Basic Effect: Extra 2d6 to one target; or 1d6 to all targets
